content:
User: So break that down and explain that to me even more terms. So I can understand it and what does that mean? What mentally is the human in this loop, what do I need to be focusing on the humanoids? | Jarvis: Let me strip away the technical jargon and put this in plain terms.

Imagine you are driving a car with a steering wheel that has a slight delay. You turn the wheel, and a fraction of a second later, the car turns. You can still drive, but you are constantly correcting, fighting the lag. That is how
